creator: dinoex@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback


I can't reproduce your problem. 

the sendmail ports build and carete a package 
when SENDMAIL_WITHOUT_MILTER is set. 

You need to start with a clean workdir. 
make clean SENDMAIL_WITHOUT_MILTER=yes install 

or put the option in /etc/make.conf, 
so it won't be forgotten. 

In case it still brekas on your system, 
please include the errormessage.
